contracts.description: Only the orchestrator may write to the project state file.
contracts.rule: Worker agents use statePatchSuggestion; orchestrator merges.

contracts.description: Each agent may only modify files within its owns paths and must not touch forbidden paths.
contracts.enforcedBy: agents[].owns and agents[].forbidden in agent-rules.json + guard-diff.mjs
contracts.rule: Cross-boundary edits are documented, not silently applied.

contracts.description: UI surface code must use only registered design tokens.
contracts.rule: Hardcoded colors, unregistered prefixes, and forbidden patterns are blocked.

contracts.description: Agents must escalate to user when loop counters exceed configured maximums.
contracts.rule: Stop work and report current state, failure analysis, and next step suggestions.
